assessments.label: Q1 2026 Baseline Assessment
assessments.notes: First formal maturity assessment. Baseline established across all five ICT capabilities and three measures. Focus areas identified for Q2 improvement plan.

vulnerability_mgmt.governance: Vulnerability policy drafted but no formal owner assigned yet.
vulnerability_mgmt.ict_risk: Risks identified but residual risk has not been formally assessed.
vulnerability_mgmt.reporting: No KPIs defined. Patching status reported informally only.

performance_capacity.governance: Capacity policy exists but has not been reviewed in over 12 months.
performance_capacity.ict_risk: Capacity risks not formally documented in the risk register.
performance_capacity.reporting: Basic performance dashboards exist but not reported to management.

incident_mgmt.governance: Incident policy approved. Owner assigned. SLAs defined.
incident_mgmt.ict_risk: Incident risk assessed. Major incident risk in register.
incident_mgmt.reporting: Monthly incident KPIs reported to IT management.

change_mgmt.governance: Change policy approved. CAB operational weekly.
change_mgmt.ict_risk: Change-related risks tracked. Rollback plans in place.
change_mgmt.reporting: Change success rate tracked but not yet reported to senior management.

disaster_recovery.governance: DRP exists but owner unclear. Policy not formally approved.
disaster_recovery.ict_risk: DR risk not formally assessed. RPO/RTO not defined for all systems.
disaster_recovery.reporting: No DR KPIs. Last test result not formally documented.

capNotes.vulnerability_mgmt: Priority for Q2: assign policy owner and establish monthly reporting.
capNotes.performance_capacity: Capacity planning workshop scheduled for March.
capNotes.incident_mgmt: Good baseline. Target: add post-incident reviews for P1/P2.
capNotes.change_mgmt: CAB working well. Need to close loop on change success reporting.
capNotes.disaster_recovery: Highest risk area. DR test planned for Q2.
